tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]     (single strum)
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
If you don't wanna see me[/tab]


[Verse 1]    (DDU UDU, strumming)
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Did a full 180, crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Thinking 'bout the way I was[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Did the heartbreak change me? Maybe[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
But look at where I ended up[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
So moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
If you don't wanna see me dancing with[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
 If you wanna believe that anything[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch] (Pause)
could stop me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch] (Pause)
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Aren't you the guy who tried to[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Hurt me with the word "goodbye"?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Though it took some time to survive you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
I'm better on the other side[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
So moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 If you don't wanna see me dancing with[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
If you wanna believe that anything[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] (Pause)
could stop me[/tab]

(Don't, don't, don't)


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now ('Bout me now, 'bout me)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Don't show up, up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Don't start now (Oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Don't come out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 If you don't wanna see me dancing with[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
If you wanna believe that anything[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch] (pause)
could stop me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't show up (Don't show up), don't[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
come out (Don't come out)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now ('Bout me now)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Walk away (Walk away), you know how (You know how)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now (So)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Don't show up, up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Walk away, walk away (So)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Don't show up, up, up[/tab]
F                        (sharp stop)
Walk away, walk away, oh
